mapper.select: SELECT id , title , content , author , view_count , created_at , updated_at FROM Board WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id , title , content , author , view_count , created_at , updated_at FROM Board WHERE 1=1
AND id LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND title LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM Board WHERE 1=1
AND id LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND title LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
